title: Pet Munchies Wild Salmon Dog Training Treats, Grain Free Tasty Bites with Natural Real Meat 50g (Pack of 8)
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: 100% NATURAL, PREMIUM REAL SALMON: This tasty treat is made with 100% natural, human-grade wild salmon - made from the finest ingredients and delicately baked to perfection in their own natural juices
THE PERFECT TRAINING AID: Give as a reward on walks or at home for recall and training or simply for pleasure, all dogs love the taste of these tasty bites

SUITABLE FOR ALL BREEDS & SIZES: Our salmon training treats are suitable for all breeds of dogs and puppies over 4 months - please remember that these treats should make up a small part of your pet's balanced diet

HEALTHY & JUNK-FREE WITH OMEGA 3: Salmon is known to be a healthy source of Omega 3, minerals and one of the few natural food sources of Vitamin D, as well as being grain and gluten free these treats are the perfect healthy snack to feed your four legged friends

SEALED WITH A DOG'S APPROVAL: Pet Munchies is a UK based company dedicated to creating premium, gourmet treats that are made with high quality, human grade meat. Our treats are delicious, nutritious and wholesome, with all the meaty flavours dogs love delicately toasted to perfection!

specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎Store in a cool dry place out of reach of children and pets.
specifications_table.Special features: ‎Can be given as a reward or simply for pleasure, great for pups and dogs of all sizes., Delicately baked to perfection in their own natural juices, No artificial flavours and colours, Grain and Gluten free., Premium gourmet tasty bites, made with the finest ingredients., Single source protein
specifications_table.Specific Uses: ‎Eye Care, Heart Care, Skin and Coat Health
